refinement_sections.content: We need to find a secondary alcohol and an environmentally friendly oxidizing agent for our reaction.
1. Understand how a secondary alcohol turns into a ketone. 2. Identify the steps in the reaction and any important parts like intermediates.
Choose a common secondary alcohol like isopropanol and a green oxidizing agent like hydrogen peroxide.
Explain the steps of the reaction in simple terms, like what happens first, second, and so on.
Look at how the chosen oxidizing agent affects the environment.
Think about what other reactions might happen and how to stop them.
